{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205533971E611CB1F9EAA92AB4"}"},"total":1117},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7568499423546868505","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一如既往的诙谐幽默，九难，大计，八爷，还是熟悉的味道和配方。玉玉最好是来个地府叫我小先生五部曲。这样就最好[偷笑]希望玉玉能够一路长虹，一切顺遂，平安健康，能够多多写书给我们看。","text_exts":[{"e":44,"s":37,"text":"地府叫我小先生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9C%B0%E5%BA%9C%E5%8F%AB%E6%88%91%E5%B0%8F%E5%85%88%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774270534EAA92AB4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227568499423546868505%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227512233916309179454%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9C%B0%E5%BA%9C%E5%8F%AB%E6%88%91%E5%B0%8F%E5%85%88%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762180207,"group_id":"7512233916309179454","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1zm5D6NTiSlO43Xs+ByDNpeQbYL3ECBt46YTEk8C45/","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/854ca015afab4ae7ac8ca392ba131bc7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787653&x-signature=w19MlXsvoycR%2B%2BCdHj6mOQr8td8%3D","user_id":"3331958239148220","user_name":"莫.知"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3331958239148220","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7512233916309179454"
